subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that lamenteth and saith: O people! Raise not objections against Him Who hath come to give you life, and turn not away from Him Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح ینوح و یقول یا قوم لاتعترضوا علی الذی اتی لحیوتکم و لاتعرضوا عن الذی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action
